resources.string: Start collection to run audio, motion, GPS, and screenshot pipelines in the background. You will be asked to allow screen capture (full display) once per session. Screenshots pause while the screen is off.

Trains a regression random forest on the four in-memory caches: audio dB, screenshot sentiment, and sun score are aligned to each motion step-total timestamp (LOCF + forward fill + medians), then used to predict session step total. Needs enough motion step rows in cache.
Audio, motion, GPS, and screenshot pipelines are active.
Open the app once so collection can initialize, then try again.
Allow screen capture to record the full display while collection runs, or stop and try again.
No entries in the in-memory 30 min window yet.
%1$d point(s) · volatile cache only · newest first
%1$s · %2$d pts in memory (4 modalities) · UI tick %3$s
Enter 1–60 for the in-memory cache row interval.
Enter 1–60 for the shared in-memory cache window.
